description_long: This is a small, irregularly shaped pond set within a patch of dry, earthy terrain. The pond features a gently curving water body with a dark blue surface, surrounded by a natural bank of exposed soil and scattered rocks. Sparse tufts of dry grass and low vegetation are distributed unevenly around the pond, with a single, slender tree bearing green leaves growing near one edge. The water appears calm and slightly recessed below the surrounding ground, with no visible artificial edging or structures. The overall scene evokes a naturalistic, semi-arid park or urban green space, with a focus on organic forms and subtle color contrasts.
description: A small, naturalistic pond with blue water, surrounded by dry soil, scattered rocks, tufts of grass, and a single leafy tree.
description_view_0: The pond curves from left to right, bordered by dry grass and a prominent tree on the right bank.
description_view_1: The tree is more central, with the pond extending diagonally and grass and rocks visible along the banks.
description_view_2: The pond appears narrower, with the tree on the left and more open, grassy terrain on the right.
description_view_3: The pond winds from the foreground to the back, with the tree standing alone on the far bank and sparse grass throughout.
attribute_edge_treatment: The pond is bordered by natural, uneven soil banks with scattered rocks and tufts of dry grass, lacking any artificial edging.
